problem id: a6d00147
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10110110 -> 01110110
  00100110 -> 01100100
  11000000 -> 00011000
  10000000 -> 00010000
  00110100 -> 01000110
  00110111 -> 01110110
  10101001 -> 10000101
  01001000 -> 10001001
  01000000 -> 00001000

query: 01101110
predicted answer: 11101101
